title: HackerOne Bug Bounty Disclosure: cve-use-after-free-in-smb-connection ...
snippet: TheHackerOnereport describes a heap-use-after-free vulnerability in curl (CVE-2026-3805) that occurs when curl processes two SMB URLs targeting the same host using connection reuse. The bug happens because a pointer (req->path) ends up referencing memory that has already been freed when the SMB connection is recycled for the second URL.
